decks.notes: This deck focuses on utilizing Survival of the Fittest to consistently tutor for creatures from the deck, ensuring board control and advantage. It also includes powerful control elements like Swords to Plowshares and Meddling Mage to disrupt opponents' strategies. The inclusion of cards like Sylvan Library and various utility creatures helps the player gain card advantage and maintain board presence. The deck aims to outmaneuver opponents by constantly adapting to different situations and leveraging the strength of its creatures and control cards.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying a board full of elves to generate mana with cards like Priest of Titania and Gaea's Cradle, while utilizing cards like Survival of the Fittest to search for key creatures like Kamahl, Fist of Krosa or Deranged Hermit. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with early aggression and maintain card advantage through cards like Sylvan Library and Squee, Goblin Nabob. With a mix of efficient creatures and disruptive spells like Thornscape Battlemage, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and secure victory before they can stabilize.

The focus of this deck is to heavily disrupt and control the opponent's plays while maintaining a steady stream of card advantage and mana efficiency. With a mix of counterspells, bounce spells, and card draw, the deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan and gradually take control of the game. The win condition is through land-based beatdown with Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave, while also utilizing Parallax Tide to remove opponent's lands and secure the victory. The deck is designed to outlast and outmaneuver opponents through careful resource management and strategic plays.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and burn spells to deal damage to the opponent as quickly as possible. It also includes disruption spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to control the board with removal spells like Terminate and Lightning Bolt while also applying pressure with efficient creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup. With a low mana curve and efficient threats, this deck aims to close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Vindicate, disrupting the opponent's hand with Duress, and generating card advantage with Skeletal Scrying. The win condition comes from playing powerful threats like Exalted Angel and Decree of Justice, while also having the option to recur key creatures like Eternal Dragon with Volrath's Stronghold. The mana base is carefully crafted to support the deck's color requirements and includes utility lands like Dust Bowl and Kor Haven for additional control elements. The overall strategy is to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a grindy game.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures such as Grim Lavamancer, Mogg Fanatic, and Wild Mongrel to deal damage to the opponent. Utilizing efficient burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, along with powerful enchantments like Rancor, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while controlling the board with cards like River Boa. The inclusion of Sylvan Library helps with card advantage and consistency. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and relentless assault, utilizing a combination of creature aggression and burn spells.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent through direct damage spells and efficient creatures like Mogg Fanatic, Jackal Pup, and Ball Lightning. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize, with cards like Grim Lavamancer and Sulfuric Vortex providing additional damage over time. The inclusion of Fireblast allows for a powerful finisher when the opponent is low on life. Overall, this deck aims to win as quickly as possible with a relentless assault of burn spells and creatures.

The primary focus of this Mono Black Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's resources and hand while slowly draining their life with cards like Hypnotic Specter and The Rack. By utilizing cards like Duress and Cursed Scroll, the deck aims to maintain control of the board and prevent the opponent from developing a strong presence. The inclusion of cards like Wasteland and Mishra's Factory also provides additional utility and ways to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent by out-resourcing them and chipping away at their life total.

The main concept of this Deadguy Ale deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy with hand disruption and removal spells while maintaining a steady flow of card advantage and threats. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Vindicate and Swords to Plowshares, while also pressuring the opponent with aggressive creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Exalted Angel. With a mix of disruption, removal, card advantage, and threats, this deck aims to outmaneuver the opponent and secure a victory through a combination of efficient plays and precision.

The main concept of this Goblins aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with cheap and efficient creatures. By utilizing Goblin Lackey to cheat out creatures early, backed up by powerful tribal synergies like Goblin Warchief and Goblin Piledriver, this deck aims to deal significant damage to the opponent quickly before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of removal like Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander provides additional reach and flexibility to deal with threats on the opponent's side of the board. The mana base is built to support a fast and aggressive game plan, with options for land disruption through cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by using counterspells, removal spells, and board wipes to neutralize threats from the opponent. The deck aims to establish a lock on the game with cards like Standstill and prevent the opponent from gaining momentum. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, the deck can dictate the pace of the game and gradually build up advantage until it can secure the win. The deck also has some land destruction elements to further disrupt the opponent's strategy.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy and maintaining control over the game through various means. It utilizes cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy to strip the opponent's hand of key cards, as well as counterspells like Mana Leak to prevent threats from resolving. Contamination and Zombie Infestation provide ways to generate advantage and pressure the opponent. The deck also includes removal like Smother and Sickening Dreams to handle threats on the board. Overall, the key concept of this deck is to establish and maintain control over the game while disrupting the opponent's game plan.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the combo of Parallax Wave and Opalescence to create an infinite loop of exiling and returning permanents, leading to a win condition with Replenish. It also includes various control elements such as Mana Leak and Seal of Cleansing to support the combo and disrupt the opponent's game plan. With a mix of card draw, search, and counter spells, the deck aims to set up the combo efficiently and protect it until victory is achieved.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with direct damage spells and aggressive creatures like Ball Lightning and Jackal Pup. By efficiently using burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, the deck aims to reduce the opponent's life total as fast as possible. Cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Pyrostatic Pillar also help to apply consistent pressure over time. The mana base is streamlined to ensure that the deck can consistently cast its low-cost spells and maintain a fast pace throughout the game.

This deck focuses on quickly building a board presence with various Sliver creatures and using spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate to control the opponent's creatures. The inclusion of cards like Sylvan Library and Cursed Scroll provides card advantage and additional removal options, while the inclusion of lands like Treetop Village and Wooded Foothills ensures consistent mana production. The synergy between the Sliver creatures, which provide various buffs and abilities to each other, allows for aggressive plays and overwhelming the opponent with a fast and efficient beatdown strategy.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures like Terravore to quickly pressure the opponent while utilizing disruptive cards like Meddling Mage and Armageddon effects to control the board. The deck also includes land destruction elements like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to disrupt the opponent's mana base. Sylvan Library provides card advantage while Weathered Wayfarer helps to fix mana and find crucial lands. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient threats and disruption, while also controlling the game through resource denial.
